mapper.select: select p.id, p.name, p.code, p.url, p.type, p.parent_id, p.order_no, p.icon, p.component from superagent_user_role ur inner join superagent_role r on ur.role_id = r.id inner join superagent_role_permission rp on r.id = rp.role_id inner join superagent_permission p on rp.permission_id = p.id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and ur.is_deleted = 0 and r.is_deleted = 0 and rp.is_deleted = 0
